_purpose: Stable Chrome unpacked-extension public keys per variant, generated in Phase 8A-1 (2026-05-19). Pre-Phase-8A-1, extension IDs were derived from the load-path string (Chrome's default behavior when no manifest 'key' is set). The Phase 8A audit established that the planned 'h2o-source' folder rename would change every load-path string and therefore rotate every extension ID — including the OAuth-Google variant whose ID is registered as an OAuth Redirect URL in Supabase Auth. Phase 8A-1 hardens IDs by injecting a per-variant 'key' into manifest.json so Chrome derives the ID from the public key (path-agnostic) instead of from the load path.
_format: variants.<variant>.key = base64-encoded SubjectPublicKeyInfo (DER) RSA-2048 public key, injected verbatim into the variant's manifest.json. variants.<variant>.id = the deterministic Chrome extension ID Chrome computes from sha256(key)[:16] character-mapped a-p; stored here as documentation only — the build pipeline does not consume this field.
_security: Private keys were generated in-memory (Node crypto.generateKeyPairSync) and discarded immediately after extracting the public keys. Private keys are NOT stored on disk and are NOT in git history. Public keys are NOT secrets — they appear in every manifest.json and any installed extension can be inspected for them. For pure unpacked-extension development this is sufficient; private keys are only needed for Chrome Web Store signed packages, which this project does not currently produce.
_warning: Do NOT regenerate these keys without coordinated updates to: (a) Supabase Auth Redirect URLs (currently registered with the dev-controls-oauth-google ID below); (b) the two hardcoded validators in tools/validation/identity/ that pin the OAuth-Google ID (validate-identity-phase3_9c-google-oauth-release-gate.mjs and validate-identity-phase3_5b-release-gate.mjs); (c) any chrome.storage.local data keyed to current IDs (data will be lost on ID rotation).
_oauth_id_rotation: Phase 8A-1 rotated the OAuth-Google extension ID from 'amjponmninhldimbkdkfhcmclmjfbibi' (the pre-hardening path-derived value, registered in Supabase Auth) to 'ogcjkeaiicglflamhjaaimdhphjlgkbb' (the new key-derived value). The two hardcoded validators were updated atomically in this phase. The Supabase Auth Redirect URL update is the only OPERATOR action required outside this commit.
